content.content: Russian social media star and fitness influencer who rose to fame on TikTok, where he posts clips from the gym, prank videos, and skit videos. He often uses friends to play various characters in his videos. He has amassed more than 3.2 million followers and over 23 million likes on his alexander_iron_ account. He launched his TikTok account in March 2021. He posts snapshots from the gym and progress pictures on his alexanderiron Instagram account. He has more than 10,000 followers. He was born and raised in Russia. In February 2022, he posted a TikTok set toJaymes Young's "Infinity."
